data.text: I found the current file set: the dead code appears to have already been renamed into `session_usage.go`, so I’m checking whether the old aggregators still exist there and whether the tests are just exercising them. That tells me whether this is a pure deletion or a more surgical trim.

The current file is not the old 300-line aggregator blob anymore; it contains the monthly/session usage helpers. I’m now checking actual callers and any remaining dead-only tests so I don’t remove code that still feeds live paths.

I’ve confirmed the usage helpers are still wired into GraphQL resolver code, so deleting them would break live behavior rather than remove dead code. I’m checking whether the bead is simply stale against this branch’s current state before I write the required no-change evidence.

data.text: I’ve got the verification results. I’m writing the execution evidence file now with the live-call references and the fact that the monthly-shard refactor is already present, so the bead needs triage instead of deletion.

I’ve finished the evidence write-up. I’m grabbing one last line-numbered snippet for the resolver’s direct `AggregateUsageCounts` calls so the final note can point to concrete evidence instead of paraphrasing.

No code changes were made.

- The requested cleanup is stale against this branch: `cli/internal/agent/session_usage.go` still contains live usage helpers, not dead-only aggregators.
- Live callers exist in [`cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_providers.go`]( /tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-a13eb42a-20260505T025035-833c8378/cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_providers.go#L188 ) and [`cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_providers.go`]( /tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-a13eb42a-20260505T025035-833c8378/cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_providers.go#L484 ), plus the trend projection uses [`LinearSlope`]( /tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-a13eb42a-20260505T025035-833c8378/cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_providers.go#L293 ).
- I wrote the required evidence file at [`no_changes_rationale.txt`]( /tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-a13eb42a-20260505T025035-833c8378/.ddx/executions/20260505T025035-833c8378/no_changes_rationale.txt ).
- Verification passed: `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/...` and `cd cli && go build ./...`.

If you want, I can re-scope this bead to the actual remaining dead code once you point me at the current target.
